reviews.comment:
Siempre es una experiencia,  lo improbable es que encuentres estacionamiento para tomarte un café. Es imposible aún habiendo plazas. No se porque restringen tanto las plazas de estacionamiento que tienen habilitadas. Es un desgaste querer frenar x algo más que cargar combustible. Lo peor es el trato de los que no quieren habilitar los lugares. A veces uno necesita ir al baño y no puede quedar en doble fila tampoco. Eso baja mucho el servicio.
Fuera de eso, excelente. Cuenta con el servicio de pre VTV y tmb lavado!

(Translated by Google)
It's always an experience, but finding parking to grab a coffee is unlikely. It's impossible even when there are spaces available. I don't know why they restrict the number of parking spaces so much. It's exhausting to have to stop for anything other than refueling. The worst part is the attitude of those who refuse to make the spaces available. Sometimes you need to use the restroom and you can't even double-park. That really detracts from the service. Aside from that, it's excellent. They offer pre-VTV inspections and car washes!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5d0tpMUN3EAE

reviews.comment:
El personal que atiende no solo q es de cuarta, son todos pibitos mal educados, mal presentados y no dan ganas de comprar ni un cafe, fui ayer a las 20hs compre una gaseosa y cuando me tenia q dar el vuelto se querian quedar con $20 mios con la excusa q no tenian cambio. El barrio de palermo merece un mejor servicio y por sobre todo un personal normal y  no estos pibitos q se sacan la indumentaria de YPf y parecen delincuentes de hecho tenian la intencion de quedarse con mi plata con la excusa q no tenia cambio. A cuantos le haran lo mismo

(Translated by Google)
The staff isn't just terrible, they're all rude, poorly presented kids, and you wouldn't even want to buy a coffee. I went yesterday at 8 pm, bought a soda, and when they were supposed to give me my change, they tried to keep my $20, claiming they didn't have any. The Palermo neighborhood deserves better service and, above all, decent staff, not these kids who take off their YPF uniforms and look like criminals. In fact, they intended to keep my money, using the excuse that they didn't have change. How many other people will they do the same to?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5ejV2MmxnRRAB
